title: alisma plantago-aquatica var. brevipes
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica var. brevipes, also known as American water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica var. brevipes include reducing edema, alleviating symptoms of kidney and urinary disorders, and supporting liver health. Alisma plantago-aquatica var. brevipes can be prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its therapeutic effects.
